inline_comments.message:
This image is not publicly available:

$ docker pull registry-dev.nso.lab-services.ca/nso-platform-onap-cds-regression-image:latest
Error response from daemon: Get https://registry-dev.nso.lab-services.ca/v2/: net/http: request canceled while waiting for connection (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)


$ ping registry-dev.nso.lab-services.ca
PING nso-proxy.nso.lab-services.ca (204.101.2.21) 56(84) bytes of data.
^C
--- nso-proxy.nso.lab-services.ca ping statistics ---
25 packets transmitted, 0 received, 100% packet loss, time 24567ms

In that case it should be either hosted on dockerhub or dockerfile should be provided and configuration changed to leverage on it.
